morningBrief.headline: The Mountain Got a Touch-Up
morningBrief.body: 1" of fresh snow settled in overnight. Not a powder day, but an upgrade. The forecast is flirting with us: light snow expected. Not a dump, but welcome.

morningBrief.headline: A Refresh Is Coming
morningBrief.body: 51 of 64 trails are open with 39 groomed. Windy with a temperatures TBD. Keep an eye on the sky - a refresh is coming. A few inches on the way.

morningBrief.body: 8 of 176 trails are open with 4 groomed. Windy with a temperatures TBD. Winter has more to say. 12" forecasted means conditions improving soon.

morningBrief.headline: Major System Approaching
morningBrief.body: 106/144 trails spinning, 62 freshly groomed. Windy. A significant storm is brewing with 7" expected over the next few days.

morningBrief.headline: Major System Approaching

morningBrief.headline: The Mountain Got Buried
morningBrief.body: It's a 7.5" day. You know what to do. First chair or regret it. Nearly full mountain access with 114 of 120 trails spinning.

morningBrief.headline: Rain at Base, Snow Up Top
morningBrief.body: The mountain is absolutely loaded with 8.7" of fresh. This is not a drill. Nearly full mountain access with 167 of 170 trails spinning. Transition weather: rain turning to snow as you climb. Variable conditions throughout.
